decisions.choice: Simplified conditional logic using min/max bounds
decisions.reason: Reduced redundant conditions while maintaining identical behavior. Original had 3 conditions for small gap (0, 1, <=2), simplified to single condition (<=2)
alternatives: Extract to separate functions per gap size

decisions.reason: More idiomatic Go, uses standard library. Performance identical for small lists but clearer intent
Improved readability and maintainability. Constants smallGapMaxQuestions=2, mediumGapMinQuestions=3, mediumGapMaxQuestions=5 make limits explicit
Simplified medium gap logic. Note: Go 1.21+ has built-in max() but not assuming version

learnings.content: Tests revealed that buildContext fallback behavior is intentional. Attempted simplification to only return direct matches broke TestSelectQuestions_IncludesContextInformation. The fallback to any non-empty context is required by design.
Refactoring must verify behavior is preserved. When simplifying buildContext, test failure immediately indicated behavior change. Reverted before proceeding.
